title: Charred Crumbly Uruguayan Brown Rice Noodle Pilaf
description: A comforting and flavorful Uruguayan dish made with charred brown rice noodles, shio-koji-cure, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Cook the brown rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large pan, heat 1 tbsp of avocado oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until lightly charred, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the smoked paprika, ground cumin, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked brown rice noodles to the pan and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the Shio-Koji Cure to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and char the noodles for 5-7 minutes, until lightly browned.
Remove the pan from the oven and garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Serve the charred crumbly Uruguayan brown rice noodle pilaf hot.
